commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a WebChat tail-duplicate guard for same-run assistant final, aborted, and stream-fallback events while preserving cross-run repeated messages, with focused controller tests.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +127. Total +151 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at the source level: current main appends a renderable same-run final assistant payload even when `chatMessages` already ends with the same message. I did not establish a live intermittent WebChat reproduction in this read-only pass.
